## Type of Change
<!-- To check one of these boxes, put a lowercase "x" with no trailing or leading spaces inside the brackets. -->
- [ ] Refactor (non-breaking change that refactors internal code without affecting the public API)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] I have ensured that I have followed the contribution guidelines (found in `CONTRIBUTING.md`).
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, especially in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation.
- [ ] I have ensured my code complies with pre-existing tests.
- [ ] I have added tests (if applicable) that prove my change works.
